findings.issue: Project-knowledge file links use only two levels of `../` (`../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`). From `work/03-i18n/tasks/8.md` repo root is three levels up — links resolve to non-existent paths.
findings.fix: Replace `../../.claude/...` with `../../../.claude/...` for project.md, architecture.md, patterns.md, ux-guidelines.md (lines 86-89). Sibling tasks 6/7/9/10 use the correct three-level form.

findings.issue: Skill link uses `~/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` — `~` does not resolve in Markdown links rendered from a file path. Sibling tasks (7, 9, 10) use `../../../.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md`.
findings.fix: Replace `~/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` with `../../../.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` for consistency and link correctness.

findings.issue: Step 3 contains an inline JS snippet `async function switchTo(code) { if (code === locale.value) return; await setLocale(code) }`. Template explicitly forbids pseudocode in `What to do` (WHAT, not HOW). Belongs in Details > Implementation hints.
findings.fix: Replace the literal function body with a prose description (e.g. 'Click handler awaits `setLocale(code)`; early-return when clicked code equals current locale'). Keep code-shaped hints in Implementation hints.

findings.issue: Section is present but states `No new unit tests are introduced here`. For pure shell/layout edits, the template recommends deleting the TDD Anchor section rather than keeping it as a non-anchor essay. The current text is informative but inconsistent with template intent.
findings.fix: Either delete the TDD Anchor section (per template guidance for non-test code tasks) or convert it into one or two concrete focused anchor entries (path::name — what it verifies). The current narrative-only form is neither.

findings.issue: Section lists existing specs as regression-baseline references rather than tests authored in this task. Template's TDD-Anchor purpose is 'tests to write BEFORE implementation'. Keeping existing specs as anchors is a legitimate design choice (Decision 16, AC18) but technically misuses the section.
findings.fix: Either rename the heading semantically (e.g. `## Test Baseline`) and document that no new tests are authored, or delete the TDD Anchor section and move the regression-baseline guidance into Details > Implementation hints. Current shape is acceptable but ambiguous to executors.

findings.issue: Section explicitly says `Окремих unit-тестів для цієї задачі не пишемо` and substitutes smoke verification for TDD. Template intent is anchor entries (path::name — description). For non-test code tasks the template says 'delete this section'.
findings.fix: Delete the TDD Anchor section; keep the rationale (Decision 16 fixes existing specs as regression baseline) in Description or Details. Alternatively elevate the smoke baseline to anchor entries (`tests/pages/dashboard.spec.ts::existing cases — must remain green under default uk locale`).

findings.issue: Task modifies 5 files (login.vue, register.vue, forgot-password.vue, reset-password.vue, verify-email.vue). Validator rule heuristic is 1-3 files. The grouping is cohesive (auth-pages translation, identical patterns, shared dictionary namespace) and explicitly groups this way per tech-spec Implementation Tasks Task 9 — so this is an authorized scope expansion, not a defect. Flagged for visibility only.
findings.fix: No action required. If the executor finds the task too large at run-time, consider splitting per-page in a follow-up; current grouping matches tech-spec authorial intent.
